content:
✨ clamshell | C++
🎯 Primary Use Case: Enabling laptop users to close their lid and use external monitors seamlessly on Linux, regardless of power connection or init system.
✨ Key Features: • Implements clamshell mode on Linux • Does not require AC power • Independent of init systems • Configurable suspend modes (freeze, suspend_to_ram, suspend_to_disk) • Specific NVIDIA GPU suspend handling
📖 Summary: Clamshell is a Linux daemon that enables clamshell mode, allowing users to close their laptop lid and continue working with external displays and peripherals without requiring AC power or a specific init system. It offers flexible suspend mode options and specific handling for NVIDIA GPUs.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source
